betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Electric Mushroom§f (advancedrocketry:electricmushroom) is a §6single block§f world-gen block that spawns on §6fungus-dominated planets§f in the AR progression — §6mushroom biomes§f, §6high-moisture worlds§f, and certain §6toxic gas planets§f. The block has a §6glowing purple cap§f that emits §6redstone-level signals§f and is the §6signature resource block§f of fungus-themed planetary missions.

§6Production Path (world generation)§f:
- Source: §6Electric Mushroom§f is generated by AR's planet dimension system on mushroom-rich planets via `WorldGenElectricMushroom.java`
- It cannot be crafted — it must be §6mined from a mushroom planet§f during a landing mission
- Drops: 1x §6Electric Mushroom§f when mined with any tool (will §6zap the player§f with §6lightning damage§f if touched without proper protection)

The block is the §6final milestone§f in the alien planet material questline. The block's primary use is as a §6redstone signal source§f — when placed, it emits a §615-block redstone signal§f and §6charges§f any adjacent player or mob. It is also a §6decoration block§f for building.

This quest is the §6end of the §6alien planet materials§f questline (10073-10079)§f. After completing this quest, the player has §6samples from 7 unique planet types§f and is ready to begin the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (10070) and §6Interstellar Mission§f (chain) questlines.

§cWarning§f: The §6Electric Mushroom§f emits a §6lightning§f effect when touched. Without a §6Space Suit§f (10049) with §6electrical insulation§f (the standard suit provides this), the player will take §64 HP of damage§f per touch. The mushroom also zaps §6any mob§f within §62 blocks§f.

§eTip§f: Electric mushrooms can be used as a §6natural redstone source§f in remote bases — place a §6ring of 8 mushrooms§f around a §6Redstone Lamp§f for a §615-block-radius redstone alarm system§f. They also provide §6light level 12§f, making them useful for underground mushroom farm lighting.
